nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Primary HTML entry point for the admin panel. Contains inline theme-detection script reading localStorage, a full-screen loading animation (ring spinner with glow effects), Inter font preconnect, and mounts the React app via /src/main.tsx into #root.

nodes.name: manage.html
nodes.summary: Secondary HTML entry point for the management sub-app. Shares identical theme-detection script and loading screen as index.html, but mounts the management React app via /src/manage-entry.tsx with a BrowserRouter using /manage base path.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package configuration for @code-proxy/admin-panel (private, v0.1.0). Declares workspace membership under root workspaces. Scripts: dev (vite), build (tsc + vite), test (vitest). Dependencies include React 19, react-router-dom 7, zustand, echarts, framer-motion, axios, i18next, yaml, chart.js, gsap. DevDeps: vite 7, vitest 4, typescript 5.9, tailwindcss 4.1, sass, playwright, testing-library, oxlint.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration extending root tsconfig.base.json. Sets baseUrl to '.' and defines path aliases mapping @/* to ./src/*, @app/* to ./src/app/*, @pages/*, @features/*, @code-proxy/ui, @code-proxy/api-client, @code-proxy/domain, @code-proxy/assets, and @code-proxy/i18n. Includes src, pages, features, packages, and vite.config.ts.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: React entry point for the admin panel. Mounts AppRouter inside StrictMode and HashRouter. Imports global CSS styles, goey-toast styles, i18n initialization, and GlobalIconButtonTooltip. Calls dismissAppLoader after render.

nodes.name: manage-entry.tsx
nodes.summary: React entry point for the management sub-app. Mounts AppRouter inside StrictMode and BrowserRouter with /manage basename. Imports global CSS and i18n. Calls dismissAppLoader after render.

nodes.name: tsconfig.base.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript base configuration. Sets ES2022 target, Bundler module resolution, strict mode, react-jsx, and defines workspace-wide path aliases for @/*, @app/*, @pages/*, @features/*, and all @code-proxy/* packages.
